movie.synopsis: Kote (2024) In his quest for an honest fortune to provide for his sister’s marriage and a future in the corrupt Janatha city, a truthful common man- Kotee defies the powerful gang leader Dinoo Saavkaar. When Kotee’s defiance leads to mounting debts, he faces a life-altering choice to Eliminate Or be Eliminated
